# ScrollArea

Adds a styled, cross-browser scroll viewport with custom scrollbars.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/scroll-area
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="scroll-area"
  example={0}
  code={`<div style={{ border: "1px solid var(--colors-border-default)", borderRadius: 8, overflow: "hidden" }}>
  <ScrollArea style={{ blockSize: 180, inlineSize: 240 }}>
    <div style={{ padding: 12 }}>
      {Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, i) => (
        <div key={i} style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid var(--colors-border-muted)", padding: "6px 0" }}>Row {i + 1}</div>
      ))}
    </div>
  </ScrollArea>
</div>`}
/>

```tsx
<div
  style={{ border: '1px solid var(--colors-border-default)', borderRadius: 8, overflow: 'hidden' }}
>
  <ScrollArea style={{ blockSize: 180, inlineSize: 240 }}>
    <div style={{ padding: 12 }}>
      {Array.from({ length: 24 }, (_, i) => (
        <div
          key={i}
          style={{ borderBottom: '1px solid var(--colors-border-muted)', padding: '6px 0' }}
        >
          Row {i + 1}
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  </ScrollArea>
</div>
```

## Props

| Prop          | Type                                   | Required | Default | Description                                                    |
| ------------- | -------------------------------------- | -------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `orientation` | `'horizontal' \| 'vertical' \| 'both'` | No       | -       | Orientation of the convenience scrollbar rendered by the root. |

No recipe variants are documented for this component.
